creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you Thibault.

For future reference, QA (portlint, poudriere) logs as attachments are no longer necessary, but (attachments) are preferred over external URL's when they are requested. 

Just mention that QA has passed in the issue description, similar to the following:

portlint: OK (looks fine.)
porttest: OK (poudriere, <versions>, <archs>, <OPTIONS> tested)
